name: @mindfoldhq/oh-my-openclaw
description: Inject assigned inbox task context into target OpenClaw agents

scripts.release: pnpm prerelease && npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm prerelease && npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm prerelease && npm version major && git push && git push --tags
